title: LifeSteal (Fabric)
description: LifeSteal provides a refined and customizable version of the classic experience, where if you kill a player, you gain a heart; losing all your hearts will get you banned!
body:
![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-Fabric-blue.svg)

### Commands:
*Commands are only up-to-date in version 1.1.6 and higher.*
*Version 1.20.1.7 will eventually be replaced when Lifesteal is backported.*

#### /withdraw <amount>
Withdraws hearts equal to the number provided

#### /lifesteal-client <messages/notifications/sounds>
Allows for toggling between on and off for various quality of life features.

### Operator / Console Commands:

#### /revive
Opens the Beacon of Life revive screen without requiring or removing a Beacon of Life from your inventory.

#### /lifesteal-config <info/reload>
Gives information from or restarts the config file.

### Recipes

### Future Updates
- Improved Item Textures
  - Subsequent client config for textures (classic/current)
#### Version Compatibility Update
- 1.21.8-1.21.10, 1.21-1.21.5
- 1.20, 1.20.4-1.20.6
- 1.19-1.19.4
- 1.18-1.18.2
- 1.17-1.17.1
- 1.16-1.16.5
- 1.15-1.15.2
- 1.14-1.14.4
- 1.13-1.13.2
- 1.12-1.12.2
###
_All versions prior to 1.12 are not planned for compatibility, this may change at a later date. Not all features may be available in versions prior to 1.19. If you know of a way to port features not present in older versions, please open a discussion on the mod's GitHub repository._
